special_mechanics.name: Egg Encasement
special_mechanics.description: Lolo can fire a limited number of shots at enemies to encase them in eggs temporarily. Encased enemies can be pushed to new locations, used as bridges to cross water, or shot again to make them disappear temporarily.

special_mechanics.name: Block Sliding
special_mechanics.description: Lolo can slide certain blocks around the screen to navigate obstacles and solve puzzles.

special_mechanics.name: Screen Restart
special_mechanics.description: Player can restart a screen at any time at the cost of one life.

special_mechanics.name: Temporary Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Lolo can gain other powers on specific screens, such as the ability to smash rocks or build bridges.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a puzzle-action game rather than a platformer. Available sources (Data Crystal, TCRF, Wikipedia) contain no specific movement physics parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system documentation. The game focuses on block-pushing puzzle mechanics rather than precise platformer physics. Movement parameters are not quantified in documentation.
